comments.text: I don't see this problem stated in the given reference. Am I missing something, or is the reference possibly incorrect? (The site has been updated to address this comment.)

Nevermind. The problem is on Page 78 in the given reference. I didn't notice it at first because it isn't in the section of the paper which talks about Ramsey theory. It appears at the end of the paper as a "last minute addition."
Thanks, I've added the page number for clarity.
